title: rubus × pastoralis
intro: Rubus × pastoralis, also known as the hybrid raspberry, is a cross between the European raspberry (Rubus idaeus) and the wild raspberry (Rubus fruticosus). This plant is primarily used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × pastoralis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
